narrative:
Springfield Twp township has 1,567 registered voters, with 52.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.9 percentage points.
